title: selaginella macilenta
intro: Selaginella macilenta, also known as the 'resurrection fern', is a type of non-vascular, terrestrial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against cell damage. The plant is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, and its health benefits include improving cardiovascular health, reducing oxidative stress, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Selaginella macilenta is often used as a decoction or infusion, and is also combined with other herbs to create remedies for various health conditions.
